  1. Jobs
  2. Home Physiotherapist
Physiotherapy

Home Physiotherapist

Chennai • Part-time / Contract • Posted on Feb 10, 2026

About the Role

Join our team to provide personalized physiotherapy sessions to patients recovering from surgery or injury.

Key Responsibilities

  • Assess patient condition and mobility
  • Develop customized rehabilitation plans
  • Conduct regular therapy sessions
  • Track and report patient progress

Requirements

  • Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT)
  • Experience in orthopedic or neurological rehab
  • Willingness to travel to patient locations
  • Excellent patient handling skills

Apply for Position

Please fill in your details accurately.

Life Comrades provides trusted home nursing & healthcare services. Our mission is to bring hospital-quality care to the comfort of your home.
